title: Student Dashboard
description: A Fullstack Application where students can enroll and deregister themselves in different courses. Uses cookie-based authentication to handle Session Management.
highlights: React with TypeScript for frontend development
Spring Boot and Spring Security for backend

title: Who's That Pokemon
description: A dynamic game built using React and the PokeAPI. Features a 10-second timer to guess the correct Pokemon choice. Demonstrates data fetching from third-party APIs and state management.
highlights: Dynamic UI updates based on user interaction

title: Portfolio Website
description: My previous portfolio website built with WordPress, showcasing my projects, skills, and experience. Features custom styling and responsive design.
